message:
Update dependencies, fix toon_rust package name, and pin nightly toolchain

Cargo.toml: Fix the toon_rust dependency to use the correct package name
'tru' via the 'package' field, aligning with the crate's actual published
name. This resolves potential build issues where Cargo couldn't find the
crate by its directory name alone.

Cargo.lock: Broad dependency updates including anstream 0.6->1.0,
anstyle-parse 0.2->1.0, anyhow 1.0.100->1.0.102, bitflags 2.10->2.11,
clap 4.5->4.6, and addition of new transitive dependencies (bit-set,
bit-vec) from the proptest/property-testing ecosystem.

rust-toolchain.toml: Pin to nightly channel with rustfmt and clippy
components for consistent toolchain across environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
